title: Senior Executive/Assistant Manager (Global Maintenance and Repair)
description:
Assistant Manager (Global Maintenance and Repair)

We are looking for an experienced and self-driven Assistant Manager, Global Maintenance and Repair for a global shipowner company. He/she will provide support to establish criteria, policies, guidelines for Maintenance and Repair (MNR) activity of dry & reefer unit and Assist the HOD / team lead with strategic direction and contribute to the organization-wide strategy. The ideal candidate should have good knowledge of MNR operation, equipment flow management understanding and analytical skills.

Responsibilities:

· Provide support to establish criteria, policies, guidelines for Maintenance and Repair (MNR) activity of dry & reefer unit

· Direct RHQ/Local MNR members and vendors with instruction on MNR activities for to control cost and maintain quality

· Supervise and support global cost activities

· Guide team and team leaders to enhance operational efficiency

· Assist to set organizational objectives and targets

· Conduct analysis of data on a regular basis to monitor performance and identify opportunities for improvement and report to Head of Department

· Perform regular depot audits (which includes administration and training) with the team and ensure Group policy, procedure and standards are adhered to

· Assist the HOD / team lead with strategic direction and contribute to the organization-wide strategy

· Undertake ad-hoc work, plan and execute projects

Requirement:

· Diploma/Degree in relevant discipline

· Minimum 5 years of field MNR operational skills and equipment flow management understanding

· Proficient in software / IT applications

· Detailed and analytical skills

· Good communication skills with proficiency in English to communicate effectively with stakeholders and counterparts

· Strong sense of ownership and responsibility

· Able to work independently and within a team.


To apply, please send your cv to johnson@innergy-consulting.com.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.
Thank you for your understanding!

postedCompany.description:
We provide specialized maritime, IT, HR and office professional headhunting services with a personal touch to both our clients and candidates and help connect them together.


At Innergy, we strive to be the leading maritime and shipping recruitment firm to source and deliver energetic and passionate talent who aspire to make a difference in their work for companies that recognise that people are their greatest assets.


Please visit our website at www.innergy-consulting.com to know more about us.
